mnemonics.title: Order of Header Fields
mnemonics.content: **V**ery **P**roductive **M**iners **T**ry **B**ig **N**umbers. (Version, Previous Hash, Merkle Root, Timestamp, Bits, Nonce)

mnemonics.title: Purpose of Nonce
mnemonics.content: **N**umber **O**nly **N**eeded for **C**omputation **E**ffort. (It's the value miners change to find a valid hash).
